arts.ttl: FSG will be 'secretly delighted' as Liverpool using Barcelona as 'Trojan horse' in £266m masterplan
Marcus Rashford behaviour speaks volumes as Man Utd 'mistake' verdict questioned
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has shown signs of what he can do since joining Aston Villa on loan from Man Utd - but a former player believes it's too early to start making snap judgements A former Manchester United player has warned it's too early to say whether letting Marcus Rashford leave for Aston Villa was a mistake by the Old Trafford club.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Reds eyeing three La Liga stars for summer window?
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly considering three La Liga stars as potential targets for the summer transfer window, including Real Sociedad winger Take Kubo.

arts.ttl: Player admits Chelsea wanted him but now he’s watching Liverpool with interest instead
arts.sum: Feyenoord star Quilindschy Hartman has confirmed Chelsea wanted him at one point, but now he is firmly focused on Liverpool. Voetbal Primeur cover comments from the defender today made in an interview with Voetbal International, in which he admits his eyes are firmly on the Premier League. The 23-year-old has been linked with a move The post Player admits Chelsea wanted him but now he’s watching Liverpool with interest instead appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Zubimendi HIJACK? Arsenal update as Real Madrid, Liverpool stance revealed
arts.sum: There is no risk of Liverpool or Real Madrid hijacking Arsenal's deal to sign Martin Zubimendi as things stand, according to a report. Zubimendi has a closer attachment to his team than most modern footballers and he rejected Liverpool last summer despite the fact that even Real Sociedad had seemingly accepted that he would likely leave.

arts.ttl: How to watch Aston Villa vs Liverpool - TV channel, live stream and kick-off time
arts.sum: The latest Liverpool news about how to watch the Reds play Aston Villa in their Premier League match at Villa Park

arts.ttl: Raphael Varane gives honest verdict on Marcus Rashford's Man Utd exit - 'I'm surprised'
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has made two substitute appearances for Aston Villa off the bench since sealing his exit from Manchester United on loan, and now his former team-mate Raphael Varane weighed in on the move

arts.ttl: How to watch Aston Villa v Liverpool on TV tonight - kick-off time and channel
arts.sum: League leaders Liverpool head to Aston Villa in a tricky test of their Premier League title credentials

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Liverpool LIVE: Premier League team news and line-ups ahead of huge clash in title race
arts.sum: Arne Slot’s team can extend their lead at the top to 10 points with victory at Villa Park

arts.ttl: Liverpool star ‘has offered himself’ to Barcelona for the summer
arts.sum: A member of the attacking ranks at Premier League leaders has set his sights firmly on a summer move to La Liga with Barcelona. That’s according to journalist Jose Alvarez…
